morningMessage: Start with calm, confidence, and purpose.

blocks.title: Breakfast
blocks.goal: Students eat, settle in, and prepare for the day.
blocks.teacherBrain: Use this time to greet students and set a calm tone.

blocks.title: Morning Work
blocks.goal: Students complete independent morning work while you handle attendance and setup.
blocks.teacherBrain: Keep this routine predictable so students can begin without reminders.

blocks.title: Morning Meeting
blocks.goal: Build community, review expectations, and set the day’s focus.
blocks.teacherBrain: Connect the current pillar to real classroom choices.

blocks.title: MOWR / Reading Intervention
blocks.goal: Run reading intervention rotations and support decoding/fluency.
blocks.teacherBrain: Prioritize Red and Yellow groups first.

blocks.title: Phonics
blocks.goal: Teach current Open Court phonics focus.
blocks.teacherBrain: Use quick blending and dictation before independent work.

blocks.title: Vocabulary
blocks.teacherBrain: Preteach difficult vocabulary before students encounter it in the story.

blocks.title: Open Court Reading
blocks.goal: Teach Open Court Unit 1 lesson using the Lesson Engine.
blocks.teacherBrain: Use partner talk before cause-and-effect questions.

blocks.title: Lunch
blocks.goal: Transition safely and calmly to lunch.

blocks.title: Recess
blocks.goal: Students play safely and return ready to learn.

blocks.title: Workout
blocks.goal: Students participate in safe, structured physical activity.

blocks.title: Math
blocks.teacherBrain: Use I Do, We Do, You Do structure.

blocks.title: Writing
blocks.goal: Teach writing using Building the Foundation.
blocks.teacherBrain: Use oral rehearsal before written responses.

blocks.title: Social Studies
blocks.goal: Connect content learning to literacy and classroom discussion.
blocks.teacherBrain: Connect to Open Court whenever possible.

blocks.title: Science
blocks.goal: Use workbook pages, science vocabulary, and hands-on connection.
blocks.teacherBrain: Preview science videos before students see them.

blocks.title: Pack-up
blocks.goal: Students pack calmly and clean the classroom.
blocks.teacherBrain: Start early during the first week.

blocks.title: Dismissal
blocks.teacherBrain: End with calm. Do not rush the routine.
